title: Chapter 93
content:
Chapter 93: Chapter 93: The Side Effect [18+]

After looking at his new status, Damon close his status window and look at Selene.

She slowly open her eyes a look at Damon with lustful eyes.

Damon didn’t realize but when his Incubus Lord awaken some of his Incubus aura already reach Selene.

And Selene try to hold it for a while but it no use.

Her eyes lock into Damon, the like a tiger she jump at Damon and pin him down.

"Damon... I can’t hold it..." Selene said with helpless voice.

’Well, its my fault anyway.’ Damon think while looking at current Selene condition.

Then she suddenly moved her body, positioning herself right above his cock. She lowers her body, and his rod enters her pussy again.

Selene slowly lowered her down, as her pussy swallowing his cock inch by inch.

She moaned loudly with her hands on his chest, and her hips moving up and down. As she moved, her massive mound began to jiggle like jelly in front of him.

’What a beautiful view. Her big tits bounce up and down.’

Damon gripped her waist, guiding her faster. Using Incubus Touch from his palms, sparks of pleasure raced up through her.

"Ahh, Damon! Yes~! Yes... You’re so deep... filling me up completely!" She threw her head back, platinum silver hair whipping wild. He thrust up to meet her, slapping skin on skin.

She bounced frantically, pussy clenching tight. "Yes! I like it... It feels so good~! Ahn~! I’m Coming...!"

Her walls spasmed, juices flooding down his cock. With a grunt, he push his cock deep inside her and unleashed his hot seed, filling up her insides again.

Then without resting Selene began to move again. Just like that the intimate activity continue on...

****

Two days passed after that.

Two full days before Damon finally managed to bring Selene to the point of utter exhaustion, her voluptuous body collapsing against the silk sheets in a breathless, thoroughly satisfied heap.

It had been no simple feat.

Her cultivation at the King Spirit Realm granted her a stamina that most cultivators could only dream of — a deep, inexhaustible well of spiritual energy that translated directly into physical endurance.

She could have outlasted any ordinary man ten times over.

But Damon was far from ordinary.

His Incubus Lord bloodline and physique ensured that when it came to sex, he possessed something far more formidable than mere stamina — he was effectively limitless.

Yet that very fact gave him pause.

’That was dangerous...’

’I need to be far more careful about how I use my power. To think that even a faint, barely a leak of my Incubus Aura was enough to keep Selene — a King Spirit Realm cultivator — burning with desire for two straight days...’ he thought, staring up at the ceiling.

If he ever allowed his aura to flow freely and unchecked around an ordinary woman, one without Selene’s formidable cultivation to sustain her body through the ordeal, the consequences could be catastrophic.

They would be driven into a frenzy, chasing pleasure until their life force was utterly spent, their bodies hollowed out like dried husks.

Before the thought could spiral further, the familiar chime of the System cut cleanly through his contemplation.

[Host, there is no need for concern on that front. The effect you witnessed was not purely the work of the Incubus Aura. It occurred because she was no longer a virgin, and her body had already tasted what pleasure with you truly feels like. She simply desired to experience it again.]

’What exactly do you mean by that?’ Damon pressed, his golden eyes narrowing slightly as he turned the idea over in his mind.

[The Incubus Aura does not manufacture desire from nothing, Host. Its function is to amplify the lust and longing that already exists within a person. The desires rooted in their own heart, not ones forcibly imposed upon them from outside.]

[Consider Selene Frostborn. She had only just surrendered her virginity for the first time in thirty-five years of cold, disciplined existence. In doing so, she discovered a depth of pleasure she had never known.]

[When she came into contact with even a trace of the Incubus Aura, it did not create a new desire within her. It simply magnified what was already there: the burning, freshly awakened craving to feel that same extraordinary pleasure once more. A craving she would normally have been able to suppress with her willpower, but could no longer contain under the aura’s influence.]

Damon absorbed that in silence for a moment, his golden eyes reflecting the soft amber flicker of the lamps overhead.

’So the Incubus Aura essentially acts as a magnifying glass for whatever desire already lives inside a person?’

[Precisely, Host. For another example, when you first encountered Ariel Aquaria, the aura worked on a far subtler level. At the time she had no experience of a pleasure, so there was no deep lust to amplify. The aura simply heightened her natural attraction toward you, drawing her closer. But after her came to know it, that baseline attraction transformed into something far more potent, and the aura’s effect followed suit.]

’Hah...’ Damon exhaled slowly, a quiet tension he hadn’t fully acknowledged releasing from his shoulders.

’I’ll admit, I was genuinely concerned for a moment. I thought my aura alone could send any woman spiralling into madness the instant it touched her.’

’Well. That’s a relief.’

He sat up against the headboard, running a hand lazily through his jet-black hair before turning his attention to the matter that always, eventually, came back to him.

’Let’s see the current points, then.’

[Lust Points: 2,450,000]

’I gained less per session than before...’ He clicked his tongue softly.

’Right. That makes sense. When Selene and I first began, I was still at the Earth Spirit Realm. Now my cultivation at the Heavenly Spirit Realm. The difference between realm is less. Of course the returns feel smaller by comparison.’

’Anyway...’ he thought, settling back against the pillow and closing his eyes, letting the quiet of the room settle around him like a cloak.

’I should rest properly. There are still four days remaining before I need to go to the capital city.’
